title: selaginella albolineata
intro: Selaginella albolineata is a type of evergreen fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella albolineata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a powder or tea, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form to extract its active compounds.
